summary: Russian forces reported the liberation of Bogodarovka in the Dnepropetrovsk region and Novoselovka in the Zaporozhye region, while Ukrainian drone attacks struck multiple Russian regions including Moscow, Belgorod, and Crimea. Intense ground combat continued across the eastern front in Kharkov, Kupyansk, Krasnaya Liman, Slavyansk, and Konstantinovka directions. A bombing incident in Monaco injured Ukrainian oligarch Vadim Ermolaev and two others.
key_points: Russian forces liberated Bogodarovka in the Dnepropetrovsk region, with the 36th Guards Motor Rifle Brigade of the 29th Army taking control of the settlement (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
More than 50 drones were shot down approaching Moscow during the night, with additional drones intercepted in Zaporozhye, Smolensk, and Kaluga regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
Ukrainian drone activity targeted multiple locations including Poltaava, Kremenchuk, Kropyvnytskyi, Romny, Sumy region, and the Black Sea coast near Chornomorsk (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68160).
The Russian Armed Forces struck targets in Kharkov, and Russian troops continue offensive operations in Kazachya Lopan, Volchansk, and Kupyansk sectors (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
Ukraine is negotiating a license to produce long-range SCALP missiles according to Defense Minister Fedorov (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31261).
Polish Defense Minister confirmed Warsaw will not transfer MiG-29 aircraft to Ukraine after Kyiv failed to share drone technology as initially agreed (Source: @UkraineNow/82282).
An explosion in Monaco near a residence on Rue Reverne injured three people, including Ukrainian oligarch Vadim Ermolaev and family members (Source: @eRadarrua/98740).
Putin stated he received new proposals to end the war, including limiting combat to four territories and halting deep strikes from both sides (Source: @UkraineNow/82260).

sections.executive_summary: Russian forces reported the liberation of Bogodarovka in the Dnepropetrovsk region and Novoselovka in the Zaporozhye region, while Ukrainian drone attacks struck multiple Russian regions including Moscow, Belgorod, and Crimea. Intense ground combat continued across the eastern front in Kharkov, Kupyansk, Krasnaya Liman, Slavyansk, and Konstantinovka directions. A bombing incident in Monaco injured Ukrainian oligarch Vadim Ermolaev and two others.

points: Ukrainian drone activity targeted multiple Russian regions with strikes reported on Poltava (up to 6 drones from the east), Kremenchuk (3 drones), Kropyvnytskyi (2 drones from the south), Romny in Sumy region, and Sofiyivka in Dnipropetrovsk region (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68160).
Ukraine is negotiating a license to produce long-range SCALP missiles according to statements by Defense Minister Fedorov (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31261).

The Ukrainian Air Force reported drone activity toward Pavlohrad in Dnipropetrovsk region, Lozova in Kharkiv region, Krolevets and Putyvl in Sumy region, and reconnaissance activity over Mykolaiv and Kirovohrad regions (Source: @kpszsu/66881).

Ukraine's Center for Countering Disinformation stated Putin's claim of '10 km from Sumy' is false, and Russian forces killed civilians in Dnipro, Kharkiv, and Zaporizhzhia on June 29 (Source: @UkraineNow/82277).
Power outage schedules are returning to Ukraine as Russia again postponed the capture of Donetsk region to a new deadline of December 31 (Source: @UkraineNow/82277).
Former Energy Minister Herman Galushchenko was remanded in court with bail set at 200 million hryvnias after the prosecution requested 426.3 million hryvnias (Source: @UkraineNow/82261).

Russian forces liberated Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region through the 36th Guards Motor Rifle Brigade of the 29th Army (East group of forces), with the enemy organizing counterattacks (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

The Russian Defense Ministry reported the liberation of Novoselovka in eastern Zaporozhye region by the East Guards Motor Rifle Brigade, opening opportunities for westward movement toward Yegorovka and Omelnik (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

Russian Armed Forces struck targets in Kharkov and conducted offensive operations in Kazachya Lopan, with Su-25s of the North Guards Motor Rifle Brigade engaged in Bachivsk in Sumy direction (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

In Belgorod region, multiple civilian injuries were reported from drone attacks including shrapnel wounds, barotrauma, and injuries to a woman and two men when a drone hit a car in Otradovsky settlement (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

Putin stated he received new proposals to end the war including halting deep strikes from both sides and limiting combat to four territories (Kherson, Zaporizhzhia, DNR, LNR) (Source: @UkraineNow/82260).
The EU is preparing tightening of visa policy in autumn targeting citizens of Russia, Belarus, and Iran, according to a TASS source (Source: @tass_agency/383037).

On the Kharkov direction, the North Guards Motor Rifle Brigade continues its offensive in Kazachya Lopan settlement, with battles ongoing in Losevka, Ukrainka, Zemlyany Yar, and forested areas on the Volchansk sector (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
On the Velikoburuluk sector, battles continue in forested areas near the villages of Budarki and Zemlyanka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
In Kupyansk and its environs, heavy battles are taking place, with Russian forces advancing south toward the Oskol River at a slower pace than publicly reported (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
In the Krasnaya Liman region, the assault on the city continues with battles being waged for every house (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
On the Slavyansk direction, Russian forces relying on Rai-Aleksandrovka are advancing westward, closing the encirclement at Orekhovatka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

The assault on Konstantinovka continues with the enemy responding with multiple drone attacks; the direction is receiving the most attention as crucial to the summer offensive campaign, with assaults conducted by small infiltrating groups (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

In the Sumy direction, Russian Armed Forces carried out strikes in Shostka district where Su-25s of the North Guards Motor Rifle Brigade continue firefights in Bachivsk and surrounding areas (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
Firefights continue in the Sumy region in Pisarevka, Marino, Nova Sich, and Khoten settlement (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

Ukrainian drone activity was detected along the Chernihiv region border toward Dobryanka with at least 3 UAVs, and a reactive drone was tracked from Sumy region toward Chernihiv region on a course from Talalaivka (Source: @eRadarrua/98708).
Russian-launched reactive drones were tracked toward Krolevets and Putyvl in Sumy region, with one controlled drone toward Shostka and one toward Romny from the northeast (Source: @kpszsu/66881).

In the Dnipropetrovsk region, soldiers from the 36th Guards Motor Rifle Brigade of the 29th Army (East group) took control of Bogodarivka, with the enemy organizing counterattacks (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

In eastern Zaporozhye region, the East Guards Motor Rifle Brigade liberated Novoselovka following their advance after Komsomolsk, opening westward movement toward Yegorovka and Omelnik (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
Ukrainian drones were detected on course for Kryvyi Rih and Kirovohrad region from Dnipropetrovsk region, and Sofiyivka in Dnipropetrovsk region was targeted (Source: @eRadarrua/98762).
Six drones from the Black Sea waters were detected heading toward Chornomorsk and Zatoka, with reconnaissance activity over Mykolaiv and Kirovohrad regions (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68176).
In Crimea, amidst continuous attacks, efforts are being made to mitigate damage to the power grid with scheduled power outages (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
More than 50 drones were shot down on approach to Moscow during the night, with additional BPAs shot down in Zaporozhye, Smolensk, and Kaluga regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).
Russian forces launched reactive Shaheds from the occupied Donetsk airport (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68185).
Ukrainian tactical aviation activity was reported on southeastern and eastern directions with a threat of aviation means of destruction for frontline regions (Source: @kpszsu/66906).

The Estonian Foreign Minister stated that downing Ukrainian drones in NATO countries is an acceptable price for strikes against Russia and called on Ukraine not to abandon attacks on Russian targets (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31245).
Ukraine's Air Force reported strike drones in Poltava (1 grp), Dnipropetrovsk (1 grp), Poltava (5 grp), and Kharkiv (7 grp) regions in separate updates (Source: @eRadarrua/98746).

key_developments: Russian forces liberated Bogodarovka in Dnipropetrovsk region through the 36th Guards Motor Rifle Brigade of the 29th Army (East group), with Ukrainian counterattacks being organized (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

The East Guards Motor Rifle Brigade liberated Novoselovka in eastern Zaporozhye region, opening westward advance opportunities toward Yegorovka and Omelnik while increasing pressure on the enemy's northern flank (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

More than 50 drones were shot down approaching Moscow overnight, with additional interceptions in Zaporozhye, Smolensk, and Kaluga regions during intensive Ukrainian drone operations (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31268).

Putin received new war termination proposals including halting deep strikes from both sides and limiting combat operations to only four territories: Kherson, Zaporizhzhia, DNR, and LNR (Source: @UkraineNow/82260).
Polish Defense Minister confirmed MiG-29 transfers to Ukraine are off the table after Kyiv failed to implement agreed drone technology sharing with Warsaw (Source: @UkraineNow/82282).
Ukraine is negotiating a license to produce long-range SCALP missiles according to Defense Minister Fedorov (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31261).
An explosion in Monaco on Rue Reverne injured Ukrainian oligarch Vadim Ermolaev (top-50 Ukrainian Forbes, estimated $220 million net worth in 2021) and two family members (Source: @eRadarrua/98740).
sections.threat_assessment: The eastern front remains the most active sector with Russian forces conducting multi-axis offensives from Kharkov through Kupyansk, Krasnaya Liman, Slavyansk, and Konstantinovka. The Russian Defense Ministry reported advances in Dnipropetrovsk and Zaporozhye regions, with Bogodarovka and Novoselovka liberated. Ukrainian drone operations continue targeting deep Russian territory with over 50 intercepted near Moscow, while frontline regions including Belgorod, Crimea, and border areas face persistent drone and missile threats. The Konstantinovka direction is described as receiving the most attention as crucial to Russia's summer offensive campaign.
sections.regional_response: Poland confirmed it will not transfer MiG-29 aircraft to Ukraine after Kyiv failed to fulfill drone technology sharing commitments. Polish MEP Ewa Zajączkowska-Guernik criticized the Polish government's policy of concessions toward Ukraine, particularly regarding the naming of a Ukrainian Armed Forces unit after UPA heroes. Polish Deputy Speaker Krzysztof Bosak called continued funding of the Kiev regime disgraceful, citing Ukraine's ban on exhumation of Volyn massacre victims. The EU is preparing tightened visa restrictions in autumn targeting Russian, Belarusian, and Iranian citizens.
sections.intelligence_notes: The Monaco explosion targeting Ukrainian oligarch Vadim Ermolaev, whose Alef group was one of the largest developers in Dnipropetrovsk, represents a potential targeted attack on a high-profile Ukrainian figure outside the conflict zone. Russian forces reported advancing toward the Oskol River south of Kupyansk but at a slower pace than publicly claimed. The Ukrainian Air Force reported multiple drone group launches across Poltava, Dnipropetrovsk, Sumy, and Kharkiv regions, while Russian forces launched reactive Shaheds from the occupied Donetsk airport. Air defense activity was noted across multiple Ukrainian regions including Poltava, Kremenchuk, Kropyvnytskyi, and the Black Sea coast.
